variables.notes: No separate operating depreciation or amortisation row related to COGS/cost of revenues appears in the provided excerpt above the financial section. Therefore D&A is assumed embedded in the selected parent row 'Cost of Revenues - Total', so nothing should be added separately.

No separate operating depreciation or amortisation row related to SG&A/administrative expenses appears in the provided excerpt above the financial section. Therefore D&A is assumed embedded in the selected parent row 'Administrative Expenses', so nothing should be added separately.
